goal: Add a guard at the top of countTokens that returns 0 when text is empty or not a string
acceptance: countTokens('') returns 0 without calling encoder

goal: Add a null/empty guard in computeGaps returning [] when tools is null or scripts is empty
acceptance: computeGaps(null, []) returns []

goal: Add JSDoc to exported resolveDefaultModel explaining cache and return value
acceptance: JSDoc present, no behavior change

goal: Add input validation in checkAnswer returning false when response or answer is empty
acceptance: checkAnswer('','x') returns false

goal: Add a guard in slackPayload that trims text and falls back to a default when blank
acceptance: blank text yields non-empty payload

goal: Add JSDoc to alignmentEnabled documenting which env vars are checked
acceptance: JSDoc present

goal: Add a unit test for setToolSupport/getToolSupport round-trip and resetToolSupport clearing
acceptance: test passes + tsc clean

goal: Add a guard in parseRetryAfter returning undefined for null/blank header before parsing
acceptance: parseRetryAfter('',0) returns undefined

goal: Add JSDoc to approaching describing pct/threshold and boolean meaning
acceptance: JSDoc present

goal: Add a guard in keyId returning empty string when rawKey is empty
acceptance: keyId('') returns ''

goal: Add JSDoc to dayWindowExpired explaining boundary and expiry logic
acceptance: JSDoc present

goal: Add a null-check in redactString returning the input unchanged when not a string
acceptance: redactString handles non-string via early return

goal: Add a guard in filterChain returning [] when chain is null or undefined
acceptance: filterChain(null, opts) returns []

goal: Add a null-check in flattenTreeFiles returning [] when items is null or undefined
acceptance: flattenTreeFiles(null) returns []

goal: Add a guard in repairJson returning null immediately for empty or whitespace input
acceptance: repairJson('  ') returns null

goal: Add a length-mismatch guard in coreUtilization returning [] when prev/now lengths differ
acceptance: mismatched arrays return []

goal: Add JSDoc to sttEntryFor documenting env lookup and null return
acceptance: JSDoc present

goal: Add a guard in catalogEntry that lowercases and trims the provider key before lookup
acceptance: catalogEntry(' OpenAI ') resolves same as openai

goal: Add JSDoc to the exported single-flight helper explaining dedupe behavior
acceptance: JSDoc present

goal: Add a guard in embedText that throws a clear Error when text is empty
acceptance: embedText('') rejects with descriptive message

goal: Add a divide-by-zero guard in usageRatio returning 0 when quota is 0
acceptance: usageRatio(5,0) returns 0

goal: Add a guard in percentile returning 0 for an empty values array
acceptance: percentile([],90) returns 0

goal: Add JSDoc to hasCapability documenting null perms handling
acceptance: JSDoc present

goal: Add a guard in activateLocale that falls back to en when locale is not in LOCALES
acceptance: activateLocale('xx') activates en

goal: Add a null/empty-data guard rendering nothing when data is empty
acceptance: Sparkline with data=[] renders no path

goal: Add an aria-label to the UsageMeter progress element for accessibility
acceptance: rendered meter exposes aria-label

goal: Add JSDoc to useOnline describing the online/offline event subscription
acceptance: JSDoc present

goal: Add an error-log via logClientEvent in a catch branch of api client fetch
acceptance: failed request records a client event

goal: Add a unit test for pure fn median covering odd/even-length and empty arrays
acceptance: test asserts correct middle value; existing tests pass

goal: Add a unit test for compareSemver asserting -1/0/1 ordering across versions
acceptance: compareSemver('1.2.0','1.10.0')===-1; suite green

goal: Add a unit test for csvField verifying quoting/escaping of commas and quotes
acceptance: test covers embedded comma, quote, newline; passes

goal: Add a unit test for resolveProfileName precedence flag over env over global
acceptance: test asserts precedence; suite green

goal: Add a unit test for troffEscape escaping backslash and leading-dot lines
acceptance: test asserts escaped output; passes

goal: Add a unit test for visibleLen confirming ANSI codes are excluded from length
acceptance: visibleLen of colored string equals plain length

goal: Add JSDoc to complete describing word-array input and candidate output
acceptance: JSDoc present; no behavior change

goal: Add a unit test for isStale at and just-past the staleness boundary
acceptance: test asserts boolean at boundary; suite green

goal: Add a unit test for backupOutName verifying the generated filename format
acceptance: test asserts name contains the time component; passes

goal: Add JSDoc to the main exported keystore function describing storage location
acceptance: JSDoc present above target export

goal: Add a unit test for redactOlm confirming secrets are masked in output
acceptance: test asserts redacted string hides token; suite green

goal: Add a bounded per-target fetch timeout guard via AbortController
acceptance: timeout aborts a hung request; default path unchanged

goal: Add JSDoc to have documenting the PATH binary-presence check
acceptance: JSDoc comment above have; no behavior change

goal: Add JSDoc to extractOld documenting html/url/maxText params and return
acceptance: JSDoc block above extractOld; behavior unchanged

goal: Add a top-of-file usage comment describing inputs and generated output
acceptance: comment header present; script runs identically

goal: Add a top-of-file usage header describing what the generator emits
acceptance: header comment present; no behavior change

goal: Add a unit test for severityWeight mapping each Severity to its weight
acceptance: test asserts weights for all severities; suite green

goal: Add a unit test for refDeficit true/false around the reference threshold
acceptance: test asserts boolean; passes

goal: Add a unit test for critRank ordering CRITICAL before ROADMAP
acceptance: critRank('CRITICAL')<critRank('ROADMAP'); suite green

goal: Add a unit test for parseTscResult on clean vs error output
acceptance: test asserts ok/errorCount for both cases; passes

goal: Add a unit test for keywords extracting tokens from a title
acceptance: test asserts expected keyword array; suite green

goal: Add JSDoc to selectWorkspaceRequest documenting baseUrl/repo request shape
acceptance: JSDoc block present; behavior unchanged

goal: Add a unit test for resolveLane returning matching worktree or null
acceptance: test asserts resolution and null fallback; passes

goal: Add JSDoc documenting the exported state-load function and its return shape
acceptance: JSDoc present above the function; tsc passes

goal: Add a guard that throws a clear Error when register is called with an empty id
acceptance: empty id throws with descriptive message

goal: Add a check that logs a warning when a required binary path is missing
acceptance: warning emitted on missing path; happy path unchanged

goal: Add a bounds guard so acquiring from an empty pool returns a typed error
acceptance: empty-pool acquire returns/throws clearly; tsc passes

goal: Add JSDoc documenting the circuit-breaker states and the trip threshold param
acceptance: JSDoc present; no logic change

goal: Add input validation guarding against negative or zero sample counts
acceptance: invalid sample count rejected with message

goal: Add a guard rejecting a shard index outside the valid range
acceptance: out-of-range index throws; in-range identical

goal: Add error handling around key parsing so malformed input throws a descriptive Error
acceptance: malformed key produces clear error

goal: Add a timeout guard around the long-running agent step with a configurable default
acceptance: step aborts after timeout with clear error

goal: Add a JSDoc header describing install steps and preconditions
acceptance: JSDoc present; installer logic unchanged

goal: Add error handling on the daemon start path to log and rethrow with context
acceptance: start failure logs context then rethrows

goal: Add a guard validating the target URL before proxying rejecting non-http schemes
acceptance: invalid scheme rejected with message

goal: Add an assertion that health-check interval is positive defaulting if not
acceptance: non-positive interval falls back to default

goal: Add JSDoc explaining the scoring formula and each weight input
acceptance: JSDoc present above scoring function; output identical

goal: Add a guard preventing switching to the same active endpoint as a logged no-op
acceptance: same-endpoint switch is a logged no-op

goal: Add try/catch around status serialization returning a safe fallback on error
acceptance: serialization error yields fallback

goal: Add a guard rejecting a non-positive rate limit and documenting the window units
acceptance: invalid limit rejected; valid limiter unchanged

goal: Add JSDoc documenting failure threshold and reset timeout semantics
acceptance: JSDoc present; no logic change

goal: Add validation that required profile fields are non-empty before generating
acceptance: missing field throws clear error

goal: Add a test assertion confirming concurrent identical calls resolve to one invocation
acceptance: assertion passes deterministically; suite green

goal: Add an assertion that parsing an unknown flag yields a clear error/usage result
acceptance: new assertion passes; parser unchanged

goal: Add an assertion mapping a 429 upstream response to the rate-limit error type
acceptance: new assertion passes; existing mappings unaffected

goal: Add JSDoc for the sign/verify functions and a guard for empty secret
acceptance: empty secret throws; JSDoc present

goal: Add error handling that returns a structured deny result when policy input is malformed
acceptance: malformed policy yields deny with reason

goal: Add a fetch timeout and catch to return an empty-results object on network error
acceptance: network error yields empty results object

goal: Add a guard clamping negative usage deltas to zero and document units
acceptance: negative delta clamped; positive accounting unchanged

goal: Add a JSDoc block documenting the request envelope fields handled by the bridge
acceptance: JSDoc present; request handling unchanged

goal: Add a guard that exits with a clear message if the server binary path is missing
acceptance: missing binary exits non-zero with message

goal: Add a request timeout guard on upstream fetch with a sane default
acceptance: slow upstream aborts after timeout
